overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through Night City's neon-lit downtown district at dusk, crossing busy intersections and traversing covered pedestrian walkways between futuristic skyscrapers.

events.description: character turns right while crossing the wide intersection

agents.ego_description: walking across a wide downtown intersection with heavy futuristic traffic

notable_agents.action: futuristic silver sedan driving through the intersection
black car passing by on the right side

entered.detail: large red structural arch spanning across the street with cables
giant digital screen displaying a monochrome face advertisement
tall skyscraper with prominent pink neon vertical lighting
broad yellow striped pedestrian crossing lines

segments.scene_description: The character walks across a wide downtown intersection at dusk, surrounded by towering skyscrapers with bright neon signage. Futuristic vehicles pass by on the multi-lane road while the character moves toward a large red archway structure in the distance.

events.description: moving from street crosswalk onto elevated sidewalk with glass railing
entering the shadow of buildings as the covered walkway approaches

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk next to busy street traffic

entered.detail: curved transparent glass roof structure covering the pedestrian walkway ahead
tall vertical neon light strips glowing purple and pink
green-tinted glass and metal railing separating sidewalk from street

segments.scene_description: The character transitions from the street onto an elevated sidewalk with a glass railing, approaching a covered pedestrian walkway. The glass canopy structure becomes visible ahead while the neon-lit buildings from the intersection recede into the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian arcade with neon storefronts

events.description: entering the covered walkway with glass canopy overhead
passing a vibrant pink neon-lit building facade with crowds

agents.ego_description: walking through the covered pedestrian walkway lined with neon storefronts

notable_agents.action: couple standing near the entrance of a pink neon-lit building

entered.detail: building facade with bright horizontal pink neon strips and circular entrance
illuminated booth with a large monochrome face advertisement on the side
red neon sign with stylized text above a doorway

segments.scene_description: The character walks beneath a curved glass canopy that shelters the pedestrian walkway, surrounded by intense neon lighting from storefronts. The environment shifts to a more enclosed arcade feel with pink and purple neon signs illuminating the path.

events.description: exiting covered walkway into open intersection under elevated highway
waiting at crosswalk then crossing with group of pedestrians

agents.ego_description: crossing a busy street at the crosswalk with other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in white cap and dark vest crossing the street ahead
black futuristic car stopped at the intersection waiting

entered.detail: massive concrete overpass with green neon accent lighting underneath
tall cylindrical building covered in multiple digital advertising screens
yellow striped pedestrian crossing at the intersection

segments.scene_description: The character exits the covered walkway into a busy open intersection dominated by an elevated highway overpass with green neon trim. The character joins a crowd crossing the street, passing a cylindrical building covered in digital billboards while futuristic traffic waits at the intersection.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a wide, open downtown intersection into a sheltered neon arcade before emerging back into a bustling urban hub. It begins with the character crossing a multi-lane road amidst towering skyscrapers and bright signage, moving steadily toward a large red archway. As the character leaves the street, the scene shifts onto an elevated sidewalk with a glass railing, leading directly into a covered pedestrian walkway. The environment then becomes more enclosed beneath a curved glass canopy, where the lighting transforms into an intense arcade of pink and purple neon storefronts. Finally, the camera exits the shelter and opens up into another busy intersection dominated by a green-trimmed highway overpass and a cylindrical building draped in digital billboards.
